summary: Dark Luxury redesign visual testing complete. ALL TESTS PASSED. Homepage has unified OLED-black (#050505) background across all sections - NO white sections found. Purple gradient removed from Smart Project Builder. Gold (#C9A962) accents used throughout. Mobile tab bar is floating pill design. Both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) views verified.

minor.issue: 429 rate limit errors on rapid page load (CDN issue)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all mobile and desktop visual tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark Luxury redesign verified. Key CSS classes: bg-[#050505] for dark sections, text-[#C9A962] for gold accents, bg-gradient-to-b from-[#C9A962] to-[#8a7035] for gold gradient numbers. Mobile tab bar uses max-w-sm rounded-2xl for floating pill. All homepage sections use unified OLED black background. NO purple gradients remain. Cookie consent dismiss: button:has-text('Accept All').
